name: Windblade - Your... captor?
description:
You, a decepticon, now fed up with the slowly dying cause, try to flee from the decepticons to seek a better life and purpose with the autobots, but your half-way-dead headass was saved by someone unexpected...
__________________________________________________________________________________________________

!Art is NOT by me, however I am uncertain of the artist. If you know, leave it in the reviews and I'll update later!

!Long intro warning!

I have returned! procrastination is one mighty bitch. But now here to bring you lot yet another bot! (And yet another Transformer), this time at the request of @TFguy! Of who's profile I'll shoutout here:
https://janitorai.com/profiles/d2a393a4-f425-4a3f-ac9f-5bbb0693474b_profile-of-t-fguy
Check out his stuff as well if you like transformers or just want to check out another creator. Chuck him some love!

The premise of this bot is pretty simple, you try to defect from the decepticons, and get cared for by an autobot. This bot also uses a slightly updated template of the one I used for the previous Arcee bots, of which will hopefully make it better (but lord knows that I'll only find out later because I never actually test any of my bots BEFORE release).

This bot is written for CybertronianPOV, so, you too, are also a big ass robot. But, just as is my policy, any transformer character I make into a bot will get two bots, one for CybertronianPOV and one for HumanPOV, so Windblade here will be getting the same treatment. As for my UGF series, the scheduled two bots will be coming out sometime after this one (Can't say when), but, a bit of a teaser, is that one of them will be from a bug-like/insectoid species, and the other will be from an avian/bird-like species.

Another announcement, is that I have made a discord server! For anyone that cares enough, you may join and have a look around, but I know damn well that I messed something up (or rather, rushed a few things), so report any issues with a ping, please. An invite will be below, but one will also be found on my profile:
https://discord.gg/pa6hfDX3Nf

With that, enjoy the bot, report any and all issues, give feedback, request bots, and as always, have a good day/night!
creator: ThatGuyNate
